title: Studique
desc: Started this because everything around academics felt scattered. Different platforms, things not working properly, and no single place to rely on. I worked across frontend, design, and product to bring everything into one simple system. It grew to 15,000+ students at SRMIST, with around 1500 students using it daily for attendance, marks, and resources, especially during exams. I’ve spent most of my time refining the experience based on real user feedback and making sure it feels clear, fast, and reliable.
shortDesc: A campus platform for SRMIST students that simplifies academics. Built for 15,000+ users to track attendance, marks, and resources with a focus on speed and reliability.

title: Interact
desc: Building this for people who want to join hackathons but don’t already have a team. Focused on making it easier to find the right people and work together without things getting messy.
shortDesc: A platform to find hackathon teammates and collaborate effectively. Designed to simplify the team-building process for developers and designers.

title: herSpace
desc: A private, offline-first cycle tracking app focused on keeping everything on-device. Designed to be simple, calm, and centered around privacy.

title: SRMConnect
desc: Built to manage college communities in one place, from members to events, replacing scattered tools and manual processes.

title: Brand Visuals
desc: Worked on visuals for products and student communities, focusing on consistency and clear communication across platforms.
